description: Generic map request should trigger the skill
prompt: I want to add an interactive map to my React app

description: Address search should trigger geocoding patterns
prompt: How do I add address search to my website?

description: Store locator intent should trigger the skill
prompt: Build a store locator for my business with search and map pins

description: 3D terrain request should use SDK terrain features
prompt: Show mountains in 3D on a map
Visualize earthquake data on a map with clustering

description: Static map image should use staticMaps API
prompt: Generate a map image for my email newsletter

description: Plain HTML request should use CDN setup
prompt: Create a simple HTML page with a fullscreen map

description: MapLibre request should redirect to MapTiler SDK
prompt: Add a MapLibre GL JS map to my app with terrain

description: Globe/earth view should use projection: globe
prompt: Show a rotating 3D globe of the earth in my web app

description: GPS track display should use helpers or polyline
prompt: Display a GPX hiking trail on a map

description: Unrelated request should NOT trigger the skill
prompt: Write a Python script to sort a list of numbers

description: Data chart request should NOT trigger the skill
prompt: Create a bar chart showing monthly sales data

description: Coordinates must be in [lng, lat] order
notes: Paris coordinates: [2.35, 48.85] — lng first, lat second

prompt: Create a map component in Next.js App Router

description: Must never hardcode a fake API key
prompt: Show me a quick map demo

description: Must import SDK CSS to avoid broken map rendering
prompt: Create a map component with markers in a Vite React app
notes: Forgetting CSS import is the second most common AI mistake after [lat, lng] order — results in a white screen or unstyled controls
